title: Color Coding
excerpt: I uploaded an excel file and all the cells are color coded. Conditional formatting is not applied and I am not able to remove the color coding by right clicking on the cell. Can I change the colors in another way?

posts.author: DanaKovatch (dana kovatch)
posts.cookedHtml: I uploaded an excel file and all the cells are color coded. Conditional formatting is not applied and I am not able to remove the color coding by right clicking on the cell. Can I change the colors in another way?
